caption: The video appears to be a news broadcast discussing political developments, specifically focusing on potential alliances for the year 2024 involving the JDU (Janata Dal United) party. The screen displays a breaking news segment with the headline "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" which translates to "Will there be a game with JDU in 2024?" The footage shows a group of people, likely politicians or party members, gathered in what seems to be a formal setting, possibly during a meeting or press conference. The individuals are dressed formally, and some are holding microphones, indicating that they might be addressing the media or each other. The side panels feature portraits of various political figures, including Samrat Choudhuri, Vijay Sinha, Santosh Sumon, Sumit Kumar, and Nitish Kumar, suggesting their relevance to the ongoing discussion. The overall tone of the video suggests a serious and significant political event being covered by the news channel.
